---
title: "Lecture Notes"
---

::: {.lecture-list}
### Introduction {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 01: Introduction - A Roadmap to Autonomous Robotic Systems](01-introduction-to-robotics.qmd)<br>

### Robot Modeling {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 02: Robot Modeling I - Rigid Body Motions](04-robot-modeling-1-rigid-body-motions.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 03: Robot Modeling II - Forward Kinematics](05-robot-modeling-2-forward-kinematics.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 04: Robot Modeling III - Velocity Kinematics and Inverse Kinematics](06-robot-modeling-3-velocity-kinematics-inverse-kinematics.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 05: Robot Modeling IV - Dynamics of Open Chains](07-robot-modeling-4-dynamics-open-chains.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 06: Robot Simulation - Modern Physics Engines and Contact Dynamics](08-robot-simulation-modern-physics-engines-contact-dynamics.qmd)<br>

### Actuation {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 07: Actuation I - Electric Motors, Transmissions, and Torque Generation](02-actuation-1-motors-transmissions-torque.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 08: Actuation II - Actuator Dynamics and Low-Level Control](03-actuation-2-actuator-dynamics-low-level-control.qmd)<br>

### Planning and Control {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 09: Planning and Control I - Trajectory Generation and Computed Torque Control](09-planning-trajectory-generation-motion-planning.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 10: Planning II - Motion Planning](10-control-1-pid-and-computed-torque.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 11: Control II - Operational-Space Control](11-control-2-operational-space-control.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 12: Reactive Control - Potential Field and Velocity Field Control](12-reactive-control-potential-fields-velocity-fields-mpc.qmd)<br>

### Perception {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 13: Perception I - Sensors, Measurements, and Noise](13-perception-1-sensors-noise-state-estimation.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 14: Perception II - Camera Modeling and Calibration](14-perception-2-camera-modeling-calibration.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 15: Perception III - Object Pose Estimation](14-perception-2-camera-modeling-calibration.qmd)<br>


### Integration {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 16: Integrated Robotic Systems](16-integrated-robotics-from-perception-to-action.qmd)<br>
:::
